title: Bomb's Away!
name: Robotics Club
overview:
Bomb's Away!


Robotics Club


Description

Bomb’s Away challenges participants to time the release of a payload from a remotely piloted aircraft onto a ground target. Success depends on judging speed, altitude, and wind for maximum accuracy.


Team Size

Coming Soon...


Point of contact

Dhanvanth Chandrasekaran : 7418056603
rules:
->Pilot announces the approach, participant times the trigger to drop the payload, and marshals record the result.
->No communication or interference with the pilot is allowed during the run.

title: Blaze
name: Robotics Club
overview:
Blaze


Robotics Club


Description

BLAZE is a laser Tag experience featuring a custom-built arena and DIY technology, challenging two teams to a 15-minute survivor match.


Team Size

Coming Soon...


Point of contact

Soumilya Dwivedi : 8448644855
rules:
->Two teams of four compete for 15 minutes; winners aredecided by points or full elimination.
->Players have 3 lives and register via RFID or manually;scores are tracked live.

title: Project Expo
name: Innovation Garage
overview:
Project Expo


Innovation Garage


Description

Project Expo is a platform for participants to showcase their innovative models and projects to an expert jury, gaining evaluation, recognition, and the visibility their work deserves


Team Size

Coming Soon...


Point of contact

Akhil : 90594 22616
rules:
Only original, participant-created projects are allowed; plagiarism will lead to disqualification.
->Each team must present their project within the allotted time and answer the jury’s questions clearly.
